message:
feat(ui): add RchTheme with brand colors and semantic styles (bd-3brs)

Implements RchTheme struct providing:
- Brand colors: PRIMARY (#7C3AED purple), SECONDARY (#06B6D4 cyan), ACCENT (#F59E0B amber)
- Semantic colors: SUCCESS, WARNING, ERROR, INFO
- Worker status colors: HEALTHY, DEGRADED, UNREACHABLE, DRAINING, DISABLED
- Text colors: MUTED, DIM, BRIGHT

Style generators (gated on rich-ui feature):
- success(), error(), warning(), info() for semantic styles
- muted(), dim() for secondary text
- primary(), secondary(), accent() for brand styling
- table_header(), table_border(), panel_title() for composites
- code(), path(), number() for specialized content
- for_worker_status() and worker_status_str() for status styling

Always-available methods:
- color_for_worker_status() - const lookup for WorkerStatus enum
- color_for_status_str() - string-based lookup with aliases

All 7 tests pass. Closes bd-3brs, unblocks bd-3u68.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
